Meta.title: Hayasa Tours — Group & cultural tours across Armenia & Georgia
Meta.description: Small-group journeys through ancient monasteries, mountain lakes and highland villages — guided in Armenian, Russian and English.

Footer.tagline: Group & cultural tours across Armenia and Georgia — in Armenian, Russian and English.

Home.heroSubtitle: Small-group journeys through ancient monasteries, mountain lakes and highland villages — guided in Armenian, Russian and English.
Home.f1Body: Never more than 18 travellers — real conversations with your guide and the places you visit.
Home.f2Body: Every tour runs in Armenian, Russian and English so everyone feels at home.
Home.f3Body: Local historians and naturalists who know the stories behind every stone.
Home.aboutTitle: Travel Armenia with people who live it
Home.aboutBody: Hayasa Tours is a small Yerevan team of guides, historians and drivers. Since 2018 we've run group departures across Armenia and Georgia — never more than 18 travellers, always in Armenian, Russian and English.
Home.contactBody: Questions about a tour, a custom date, or a private group? Message us — we usually reply within a few hours.

About.title: Travel Armenia with people who live it
About.subtitle: Hayasa Tours is a small Yerevan team — guides, historians and drivers. Since 2018 we've run small-group departures across Armenia and Georgia.
About.storyBody1: We started as three people, one minibus and a single weekend route. Today Hayasa Tours is a team of history guides, naturalists and drivers who know the story behind every stone.
About.storyBody2: Groups are never larger than 18, and every departure runs in three languages — so the conversation with your guide and the places we visit stays alive.
About.v1Body: Never more than 18 travellers — real conversation with your guide and the places.
About.v2Body: Every tour runs in Armenian, Russian and English.
About.v3Body: Local historians and naturalists, in love with their land.
About.ctaBody: See the next departures and pick your route.

Contact.title: Let's plan your journey
Contact.subtitle: Questions about a tour, a custom date, or a separate group? Message us — we usually reply within a couple of hours.

Team.title: One team, one family
Team.subtitle: Guides, drivers and coordinators who make every departure feel like home.
Team.joinBody: We're looking for guides and drivers in love with Armenia. Write to us.

Tours.title: Explore Our Tours
Tours.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# departure} other {# departures}} across Armenia & Georgia
Tours.seatsLeft: {count, plural, one {# seat left} other {# seats left}}

Detail.description: A full day through the Azat valley, tracing two thousand years of Armenian history — from a Hellenistic temple to chambers carved deep into living rock. Comfortable transport, expert guide, and lunch in a mountain village included.

Booking.title: Request Your Booking
Booking.offlineNote: Payment is confirmed offline — no online payment required. We'll contact you to arrange the details.
Booking.successBody: Thanks, {name}. We'll contact you on {phone} to confirm your {seats}-seat booking for {tour}.
Booking.errSubmit: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.

Auth.notConfigured: Login isn't connected yet — add Supabase credentials to enable accounts.
Auth.brandTagline: Group tours across Armenia & Georgia — sign in to manage your bookings.

Auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Hayasa Tours respects your privacy. This page explains what we collect when you request a booking and how we use it.
Privacy.collectBody: When you submit a booking request we collect your name, phone number and any notes you add. If you create an account we also store your email and preferred language.
Privacy.useBody: We use your details only to confirm and arrange your tour and to contact you about your booking. Payment is handled offline. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
Privacy.rightsBody: You can ask us to view, correct or delete your data at any time. Message us and we'll handle it.

Newsletter.title: NEWSLETTER
Newsletter.desc: Subscribe and be the first to hear about new tours and offers.
